heading: Repealed. ,June 19, 1934, ch. 657, § 348 Stat. 1116
label: 63 Repealed. ,June 19, 1934, ch. 657, § 348 Stat. 1116
notes: Section, acts , title III, § 20, ; , , made it unlawful to introduce into Canal Zone, or to manufacture, sell, transport, or possess within Canal Zone, any intoxicating liquors, except for sacramental, scientific, or medicinal purposes.Oct. 28, 1919, ch. 8541 Stat. 322July 5, 1932, ch. 42847 Stat. 579
